debug_info.goal:
a : Type
inst✝⁷ : Inhabited a
inst✝⁶ : DecidableRel fun x1 x2 => x1 = x2
inst✝⁵ : Max a
inst✝⁴ : Min a
inst✝³ : LT a
inst✝² : DecidableRel fun x1 x2 => x1 < x2
inst✝¹ : LE a
inst✝ : DecidableRel fun x1 x2 => x1 ≤ x2
k : ℕ
xs : List a
ok : k ≤ xs.length
us vs ws : List a
m : ℕ := us.length
n : ℕ := vs.length
h₁ : k ≤ m
⊢ k ≤ us.length

failed_attempts:
have h₂ : m = us.length := rfl
        calc
          k ≤ m := h₁
          _ = us.length := by rw [h₂]
      )
    else if    h₂ : k ≤ m + n then
      have h₃ : k ≤ m + n := h₂
      sorry
    else
      sorry

have h₂ : k ≤ us.length := by sorry
      sorry

h₂
    else if    h₂ : k ≤ m + n then
      vs[(k - m) - 1]!
    else
      select (k - m - n) ws (by sorry)

have h₂ : m = us.length := rfl
      linarith

-- Prove that k ≤ us.length using the fact that m = us.length and h₁ : k ≤ m
    have h₂ : m = us.length := rfl
    have h₃ : k ≤ m := h₁
    linarith)
    else if    h₂ : k ≤ m + n then vs[0]!
    else                      select (k - (m + n)) ws (by sorry)

have h₂ : k ≤ m := h₁
      have h₃ : m = us.length := rfl
      linarith)
    else sorry

have h₂ : k ≤ xs.length := ok
      have h₃ : xs.length = us.length + vs.length + ws.length := by
        simp [partition3, List.length_append, List.length_append]
        <;>
        simp_all [List.length]
        <;>
        omega
      have h₄ : k ≤ us.length := h₁
      have h₅ : us.length ≤ xs.length := by
        have h₆ : us.length ≤ us.length + vs.length + ws.length := by
          omega
        omega
      exact h₄
successful_attempts:
have h₂ : us.length = m := rfl
      simp_all [h₂]
      <;> omega

have h₂ : k ≤ us.length := by
        dsimp only [m] at h₁ ⊢
        <;> assumption
      exact h₂

have h₂ : us.length = m := by simp [m]
      have h₃ : k ≤ m := h₁
      have h₄ : m ≤ us.length := by simp [m] 
      have h₅ : k ≤ us.length := by omega
      exact h₅

have h₂ : m = us.length := rfl
      rw [h₂] at h₁
      exact h₁

have h₂ : k ≤ us.length := by simpa [m] using h₁
  exact h₂

have h₂ : k ≤ us.length := by 
    simp [m] at h₁ ⊢
    <;> assumption
  exact h₂
